User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Neon Snake game.

HighScore.title: HighScore
HighScore.description: Represents a high score achieved by a user in the Neon Snake game.

userId.description: Reference to the user who achieved the score.

username.description: The username of the player who achieved the score.

score.description: The score achieved by the user.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the score was achieved.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents a chat message sent by a user.

userId.description: The ID of the user who sent the message.

username.description: The username of the user who sent the message.

text.description: The content of the chat message.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the message was sent.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Owned by the user.
Stores a user's single highest score for the global leaderboard. The document ID is the user's UID. Writable by the owner, readable by all.
Stores global chat messages. Readable by all authenticated users, writable only by the user who sent it.
